title: The Archive
summary: Exhibition catalog and print materials for a retrospective on modernist architecture.
content: The Archive was a major exhibition at the City Museum, showcasing 50 years of modernist architecture through photographs, drawings, and models. We designed the complete print identity. The 240-page catalog uses a strict grid system inspired by the work being exhibited. Full-bleed photography alternates with dense text spreads, creating a rhythm that echoes the exhibition layout.
